testcase.name: test_assign_birthday_tag_to_contact
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_birthday_campaign_triggers.py:169: in test_assign_birthday_tag_to_contact assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 404: {"detail":"Tag not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
